codeReview.summary: The implementation satisfies the feature contract for VAL-STREAM-001/002: authenticated SSE /events connects successfully, emits a connected event with principal context, streams lifecycle events with required identifiers/context, and filters delivery to relevant participants.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker reported skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true, but did not include manual SSE sanity evidence or an explicit rationale for skipping it, despite the skill requiring manual checks for user-facing stream changes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: mors-global-worker SKILL.md step 8 requires manual CLI/API/SSE sanity checks (or explicit skip rationale); feature verificationSteps also include manual SSE capture; handoff verification lists only automated commands and transcript skeleton shows no manual watch/curl stream check.

summary: Review passed for code correctness and requirement coverage. One non-blocking shared-state/skill-process observation was recorded regarding missing manual-check evidence reporting.
